title: lagenaria vulgaris f. gourda
intro: Lagenaria vulgaris f. gourda, also known as the calabash or bottle gourd, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The calabash plant has various health benefits, including being a natural diuretic and having antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
